hero.heading:
Desire,
Curated.
hero.subheading: Premium intimates and adult wellness, delivered discreetly to your door.

about.heroSub: La'Fai is a celebration of intimacy, confidence, and self-expression.
about.storyBody:
La'Fai was founded on the belief that every body deserves to feel exquisite. We curate premium intimates and adult wellness products with care, discretion, and a commitment to quality that never compromises.

Every order is packaged discreetly. Your privacy is sacred to us.

values.title: Discretion
values.body: Plain packaging, no brand names outside. Your privacy is non-negotiable.

values.title: Quality
values.body: Every piece is selected for fabric, construction, and sensory experience.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.body: Designed for all bodies. Sized to flatter, priced to be accessible.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subheading: Discreet, friendly support. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.note: All enquiries handled with complete discretion. Order number helpful for support.

faq.a: Absolutely. All orders ship in plain, unmarked packaging. No indication of contents on the outside.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: We accept Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, Zamtel Kwacha Pay, and PayPal.
Standard delivery is 3–5 business days within Zambia. Express options available at checkout.
Unopened items may be returned within 7 days. Hygiene products cannot be returned once opened.

faq.q: Is my personal information kept private?
faq.a: Yes. We never share or sell your data. Our privacy policy is available on request.
Currently we ship within Zambia. International shipping is coming soon — join our mailing list to be notified.

checkout.heading: Complete Your Order
checkout.successBody: Thank you for choosing La'Fai. Your order will be packaged discreetly and dispatched within 1–2 business days. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
